T0175.title: Data Euphemism
T0175.definition: A coded term used on public social platforms to evade censorship, where 'fruit' refers to illegally obtained personal data.
T0175.description: Underground actors use fruit as a euphemism for illicitly acquired personal information on platforms like Tieba to bypass keyword filtering. Such coded language often appears in sales posts, paired with terms like 'first-hand' and 'complete' to emphasize data quality. It obscures the transaction intent, making it imperceptible to ordinary users while precisely reaching underground buyers, thereby fueling the trade in personal information.
T0175.usageExample: "Selling various first-hand fruit, complete customer information, full refund if a single entry doesn't match."
